# Respondro

> AI customer service email automation for Shopify stores. Reads every customer email, pulls live Shopify order data, and writes replies in the store's voice — 24/7, on autopilot.

Respondro is a Shopify app that automates customer service email using AI. It's designed for solo founders and small teams running Shopify stores who want to handle customer support emails without hiring a full-time agent. The tool connects to a store's Shopify account and email inbox (Gmail, Outlook, or IMAP), pulls live order data for every incoming customer email, and drafts or sends a reply in the store's brand voice.

## Key facts

- Pricing starts at $29/month (Starter, 150 emails/month) and scales to $199/month (Scale, 2,500 emails/month). Enterprise starts at $699/month.
- 4-day free trial, no credit card required.
- Supports 40+ languages with automatic detection.
- GDPR compliant — customer data is never used for AI model training. EU-hosted infrastructure.
- Works with Gmail, Outlook, and any IMAP email provider.
- Integrates directly with Shopify via the Shopify App Store.
- Auto-reply mode sends replies after a 5-minute safety delay; semi-auto mode drafts replies for human review.
- Handles automatic refunds up to configurable limits, auto-cancels orders, and can trigger address changes.
- Built by Adrian Rubio, founder of Respondro, based in Copenhagen, Denmark. 6+ years in e-commerce.

## What Respondro automates

- "Where is my order?" (WISMO) emails using live Shopify tracking data
- Order status and fulfillment questions
- Return policy questions
- Pre-shipment order cancellations and address changes
- Refunds within configurable limits
- Subscription pauses and skips
- Product sizing and compatibility questions
- Detection and filtering of spam

## What Respondro escalates to humans

- Lost-in-transit packages requiring insurance claims
- Damaged or missing items
- Complaints about product quality
- Chargeback or legal language
- VIP customer inquiries
- Orders above configurable high-value thresholds
- Any email where AI confidence is below threshold

- [Homepage](https://www.respondro.ai/): Product overview, features, pricing
- [Blog](https://www.respondro.ai/blog): Playbooks and guides for Shopify customer service
- [How to automate WISMO emails on Shopify](https://www.respondro.ai/blog/automate-where-is-my-order-emails-shopify): Complete playbook for automating shipping status emails
- [Gorgias alternatives for small Shopify stores](https://www.respondro.ai/blog/gorgias-alternatives-small-shopify-stores): Comparison of 7 Gorgias alternatives
- [AI customer service email: complete 2026 guide](https://www.respondro.ai/blog/ai-customer-service-email-guide): Pillar guide on AI customer service email
